settings.question: Are accessories OECM-eligible under Agreement 2025-470?
settings.answer: Yes. Monitor arms and mounts, keyboard trays, task lighting, chair mats, whiteboards, and acoustic accessories in this collection are all covered under OECM Agreement 2025-470. Ontario school boards, hospitals, municipalities, colleges, and not-for-profits can roll accessories into an OECM purchase order alongside the rest of the furniture spec. Call 1-800-835-9565 or email quotes@brantbusinessinteriors.com.

settings.question: Which monitor arms and mounts do you carry?
settings.answer: We carry single-monitor, dual-monitor, and triple-monitor arms in clamp-on and grommet-mount configurations. For most institutional refreshes the arm choice is driven by monitor weight, screen size, and the desk it'll clamp onto — call 1-800-835-9565 with the monitor model and the desk type and we'll match you with an arm that's been tested to the same combination.

settings.question: Can you help standardize accessories across an existing fleet of workstations?
settings.answer: Yes. For multi-site or multi-workstation accessory refreshes — adding monitor arms to every desk across a floor, standardizing keyboard trays for an entire department, or rolling out task lighting — we itemize the accessory SKU per workstation count on the quote and ship in one consolidated delivery to your facilities team. Single-SKU bulk orders generally lead time faster than mixed accessory orders. Call 1-800-835-9565 with the workstation count.

settings.question: Can you handle ergonomic accommodation requests for specific staff?
settings.answer: Yes. For ergonomic accommodation requests — adjustable keyboard trays, specific monitor-arm reach lengths, lumbar supports, footrests, or non-standard accessory combinations — Brant Business Interiors quotes alongside the regular catalog and also brokers specialist ergonomic brands like ergoCentric through quote-only channels. Email the requirement to quotes@brantbusinessinteriors.com or call 1-800-835-9565 and we'll source the specific SKU.

settings.hero_subtitle: Task lighting, whiteboards, monitor arms, and acoustic solutions that complete the institutional fit-out. OECM-eligible.
settings.intro_text: The details matter. Brant Business Interiors carries task lighting, whiteboards, chair mats, monitor arms, and acoustic ceiling solutions to complete any institutional fit-out. Add accessories to any furniture order — OECM-eligible, one quote, one delivery. Quote in 1 business day.
